demographic_profile.summary: Working-age adults who lived through the COVID-19 pandemic and are now navigating its lasting impacts on their health, work, and social life. They prioritize safety, wellness, and adaptation to new norms around remote work, healthcare access, and family responsibilities. They experience ongoing concerns about health, economic stability, and maintaining relationships while managing pandemic-related anxiety and lifestyle changes.
